text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions around oil and potential chip supply chain disruptions are the main drivers today, creating uncertainty for your tech-heavy book. Inflation worries also persist.

Your holdings: SOXL (-24.46%) and SPAL (-27.71%) are both leveraged and in deep drawdowns, demanding immediate attention given their "SELL" and "NEW" statuses. Margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical developments impacting oil and chip supply, and strictly manage stops on your leveraged positions.

Bottom line: With leveraged positions under pressure and geopolitical risks rising, managing your downside is paramount.
plays: Trim SOXL if it hits your 200 stop; its leveraged nature and deep drawdown demand strict risk management.
Monitor SPAL closely; its new status and deep loss require strict adherence to its 21.38 stop. Leveraged ETFs amplify pain.
Meta's positive data center news aligns with a scanner setup. Consider a new buy around 666.47-665.31 with a 661.13 stop.
